---
title: "pig-human-cow"
---

## Get pig-human-cow orthologs

```{r}
library(biomaRt)
library(dplyr)

# ── Marts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ensembl <- useMart("ensembl")
pig     <- useDataset("sscrofa_gene_ensembl",  mart = ensembl)
cow     <- useDataset("btaurus_gene_ensembl",  mart = ensembl)
human   <- useDataset("hsapiens_gene_ensembl", mart = ensembl)

# ── Raw ortholog queries ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
homolog_attrs <- c(
  'ensembl_gene_id',
  'external_gene_name',
  'hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene',
  'hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name',
  'hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type',
  'hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence'
)

pig_human_orthologs <- getBM(attributes = homolog_attrs, mart = pig)
cow_human_orthologs <- getBM(attributes = homolog_attrs, mart = cow)

# ── Entrez ID queries ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pig_entrez   <- getBM(attributes = c('ensembl_gene_id', 'entrezgene_id'), mart = pig)
cow_entrez   <- getBM(attributes = c('ensembl_gene_id', 'entrezgene_id'), mart = cow)
human_entrez <- getBM(attributes = c('ensembl_gene_id', 'entrezgene_id'), mart = human)

# ── Build species-pair tables ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
pig_human_complete <- pig_human_orthologs %>%
  left_join(pig_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(pig_entrezgene_id = entrezgene_id)

cow_human_complete <- cow_human_orthologs %>%
  left_join(cow_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(cow_entrezgene_id = entrezgene_id)

# ── Build three-way table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Bridge: pig <-> human (via hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene) <-> cow
cow_pig_human_complete <- pig_human_orthologs %>%
  # pig Entrez
  left_join(pig_entrez, by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  rename(
    pig_ensembl_gene_id             = ensembl_gene_id,
    pig_gene_name                   = external_gene_name,
    pig_entrezgene_id               = entrezgene_id,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence
  ) %>%
  # human Entrez (keyed on the human homolog Ensembl ID)
  left_join(
    human_entrez %>% rename(
      hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene = ensembl_gene_id,
      human_entrezgene_id           = entrezgene_id
    ),
    by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene"
  ) %>%
  # cow ortholog info, bridged through shared human Ensembl ID
  left_join(
    cow_human_orthologs %>%
      select(
        hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene,
        cow_ensembl_gene_id    = ensembl_gene_id,
        cow_gene_name          = external_gene_name,
        cow_homolog_type       = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type,
        cow_homolog_confidence = hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence
      ),
    by = "hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene"
  ) %>%
  # cow Entrez
  left_join(
    cow_entrez %>% rename(cow_ensembl_gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
      cow_entrezgene_id   = entrezgene_id ), by = "cow_ensembl_gene_id" ) %>%
  # tidy column order: pig | human bridge | cow
  select(  pig_ensembl_gene_id,
    pig_gene_name,
    pig_entrezgene_id,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type,
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence,
    hsapiens_homolog_ensembl_gene,
    hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name,
    human_entrezgene_id,
    cow_ensembl_gene_id,
    cow_gene_name,
    cow_entrezgene_id,
    cow_homolog_type,
    cow_homolog_confidence  )

str(cow_pig_human_complete)

# ── Species-pair 1-to-1 filters ────────────────────────────────────────────────
orthologs_1to1_ph <- pig_human_complete %>%
  filter(hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
         hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1)

orthologs_1to1_ch <- cow_human_complete %>%
  filter(hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
         hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1)

# ── Three-way 1-to-1 filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Requires high-confidence 1-to-1 in BOTH pig->human AND cow->human
orthologs_1to1_chp <- cow_pig_human_complete %>%
  filter(
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type       == "ortholog_one2one",
    pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence == 1,
    cow_homolog_type                          == "ortholog_one2one",
    cow_homolog_confidence                    == 1,
    !is.na(cow_ensembl_gene_id)
  )

str(orthologs_1to1_ph)   # pig-human 16029 obs. of  7 variables:
str(orthologs_1to1_ch)   # cow-human 14542 obs. of  7 variables:
str(orthologs_1to1_chp)  # three-way 13747 obs. of  13 variables

# remove pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence, cow_homolog_confidence
orthologs_1to1_chp |> select(-pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_confidence,
                            -cow_homolog_confidence, -cow_homolog_type,
                  -pig_hsapiens_homolog_orthology_type) -> orthologs_1to1_chp

View(orthologs_1to1_chp)

# ── Save ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
write.csv(orthologs_1to1_ph,  "pig_human_orthologs_1to1.csv",    row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(orthologs_1to1_ch,  "cow_human_orthologs_1to1.csv",    row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(orthologs_1to1_chp, "pig_cow_human_orthologs_1to1.csv",row.names = FALSE)

## 

setwd("~/Desktop/Pan_virus_AI_Surrey_2026/")

library(readxl)
#BiocManager::install("limma")
library(limma)
library(ggplot2)
library(matrixStats)
library(stringr) 
library(reshape2)

df <- read_excel("pan_virus_surrey.xlsx")
dim(df)
gene_names <- df[[1]]   # first column explicitly
str(gene_names)

# get names overlap
# merge orthologs_1to1_chp and df by gene name
merged_df <- merge(orthologs_1to1_chp, df,
          by.x = "hsapiens_homolog_associated_gene_name", by.y = "Gene")

dim(merged_df) # 3232 out of 3934
write.csv(merged_df, "merged_orthologs_panvirus.csv", row.names =F)

```
